title: Delizie Di Calabria Pesto Calabrese 180 gr.
description: Is an artisanal Italian condiment that elegantly captures the sun-drenched spirit of Calabria in a jar: a bold, rustic blending of sun-dried tomatoes, sweet Tropea onion, tangy Pecorino and smoked sheep's ricotta, toasted nuts and a hint of capers and spices in rich extra-virgin olive oil, resulting in a vibrant, creamy pesto that lends depth and Mediterranean warmth to pasta, bruschetta, grilled vegetables or meats while celebrating the rich culinary heritage of Southern Italy.

title: Delizie Di Calabria Whole Pickled Red Onions of Tropea Calabria 180 gr.
description: Is a gourmet Italian delicacy that showcases the celebrated Cipolla Rossa di Tropea Calabria in IGP certified red onion renowned for its naturally sweet, succulent flavor and tender texture carefully preserved whole in a traditional sweet-and-sour brine; this elegant antipasto or condiment embodies the essence of Calabria's culinary heritage, bringing a bright, tangy accent to salads, pizzas, charcuterie boards or grilled dishes while offering the true taste of sun-ripened Mediterranean produce.

title: Delizie Di Calabria Pepperoni Cruschii 440 gr.
description: Are a quintessential expression of authentic Southern Italian gastronomy, presenting sun-dried Calabrian peppers that are intensely coloured and richly flavoured, prized for their smoky, slightly sweet profile and crisp-to-tender texture; celebrated in Calabria for their versatility, these crushed peppers bring bold warmth and Mediterranean depth to pizzas, pastas, bruschette and sauces, infusing each dish with the rustic essence of Calabria's vibrant culinary heritage.

title: Delizie Di Calabria Cherry Peppers With Pecorino Cheese 270 gr.
description: Delizie di Calabria Cherry Peppers with Pecorino Cheese (270 g) pairs plump Calabrian cherry peppers pleasantly mild-hot with a generous core of tangy, sheep's-milk Pecorino, creating a poised contrast of bright heat and creamy, savoury richness; preserved for serving convenience (typically in sunflower oil, with seasoning and a touch of wine vinegar), they're an instant, elegant antipasto for aperitivo boards, and equally brilliant sliced over pizza, folded through pasta, or scattered onto salads for a vivid, Southern-Italian finish.
